ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Date, flesh and skin, pitted, dried

ingredients_text: Wholegrain Oat Flakes (34%), Crispy Wholegrain Wheat Flakes (23%), Sultanas (21%), Sunflower Seeds (8%), Raisins (5%), Chopped Dates (4%), Chopped Dried Apricots ( 2%), Pumpkin Seeds (1%), Roasted Almonds (1%), Roasted Hazelnuts (1%)
